XMLDB.COMMENT: block_atrisk owned tables (FR-106c, FR-110, FR-117, FR-119)

TABLE.NAME: block_atrisk_dismissals
TABLE.COMMENT: Teacher dismissals of student flags, scoped per (courseid, userid). FR-110.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Flagged learner whose flag is dismissed.

FIELD.NAME: dismissed_by
FIELD.COMMENT: Teacher performing the dismissal. 0 = anonymized/deleted actor (FR-132).

FIELD.NAME: signals_at_dismissal
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON: signals firing at dismissal time, severity, preset. For end-of-term recalibration analysis (FR-72d).

INDEX.NAME: course_user_until
INDEX.COMMENT: Render-path lookup: is this user's flag currently dismissed in this course?

INDEX.NAME: dismissed_by
INDEX.COMMENT: Privacy provider lookup of dismissal-as-actor records.

TABLE.NAME: block_atrisk_grade_snapshots
TABLE.COMMENT: Weekly course-total grade snapshots per active student. Source for grade-trend signal. FR-117.

FIELD.NAME: finalgrade
FIELD.COMMENT: Course-total final grade at snapshot time. NULL = no information yet (FR-19 null behavior).

KEY.NAME: course_user_week
KEY.COMMENT: Upsert key for the weekly snapshot task (FR-118).

INDEX.NAME: course_user
INDEX.COMMENT: Signal evaluation: fetch the three most recent snapshots per student.

TABLE.NAME: block_atrisk_flag_snapshots
TABLE.COMMENT: Weekly per-signal flag-state log for end-of-term recalibration (FR-119 cluster). Opt-in via flag_logging_enabled.

FIELD.NAME: signal_name
FIELD.COMMENT: One row per fired signal — relational shape so aggregation is direct (e.g. GROUP BY signal_name).

FIELD.NAME: metric_value
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-signal raw metric (days idle, miss count, etc.). NULL when undefined.

FIELD.NAME: preset
FIELD.COMMENT: Preset active when this row was written (more / default / fewer).

KEY.NAME: course_user_week_signal
KEY.COMMENT: Upsert key for the weekly task — re-running in the same ISO week updates rather than duplicates.

INDEX.NAME: course_week
INDEX.COMMENT: Term-end queries: enumerate the term's flag history for one course.

TABLE.NAME: block_atrisk_course_shape
TABLE.COMMENT: Detected operational shape (cohort_paced / self_paced / one_shot_compliance / blended / unknown) per course. Course-level metadata only — contains no personal data (FR-106c, FR-106g).

FIELD.NAME: shape
FIELD.COMMENT: One of: cohort_paced, self_paced, one_shot_compliance, blended, unknown.

FIELD.NAME: confidence
FIELD.COMMENT: One of: high, medium, low. Engine treats low as if shape were unknown (FR-106b).

FIELD.NAME: features_json
FIELD.COMMENT: Aggregated feature values for diagnostics. No user identifiers, no per-student values (FR-106g).

INDEX.NAME: shape_confidence
INDEX.COMMENT: Category-level queries for cross-customer aggregation by tool_earlywarning (FR-106h).
